title.en: But even so, the value of a super-perfect treas...

content.en:
Ye Tian used the body of the Extreme Dao Creature Long Wu to constantly shuttle into the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and he was not attacked along the way, which made him breathe a sigh of relief.

He also ran into some extreme creatures, but just glanced at him and ran away, not attacking him.

After entering the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, Ye Tian began to search for treasures.

His body was too weak, and he wanted to kill other Extreme Dao creatures, but it didn't exist, so his target was never those Extreme Dao Source Crystals.

"As long as you find a treasure that contains the power of the extreme Dao, you will earn it, and if you find a super perfect treasure, you will make a lot of money!"

Although Ye Tian didn't know how many of the true super-perfect treasures of the Wudao Tower were, there were six super-perfect treasures on the surface, but in fact there were definitely more than that.

But even so, the value of a super-perfect treasure is unimaginable!

Time passes slowly.

On this day, Ye Tian sensed a strong extreme aura.

Although the Extreme Dao Source Sea is full of Extreme Dao aura, it is all weak, and somewhere not far away is filled with a strong Extreme Dao aura, there must be a special treasure.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over and soon came to his destination.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian looked at an island in front of him, and the island was filled with an incomparably strong Extreme Dao aura, and this Extreme Dao aura belonged to the Golden Extreme Dao.

Soon, Ye Tian locked on the source of the Golden Pole Dao, which was a vein buried deep in the island.

"Could it be the Extreme Dao Source Stone!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He had consulted the Lord of the Ancient Realm before, and the Lord of the Ancient had also mentioned some treasures containing the power of the Extreme Dao, including the Extreme Dao Source Stone, but the Extreme Dao Source Stone was very rare, and there were not many super-perfect controllers who entered here, so it was very rare for the super-perfect controllers who had really obtained the Extreme Dao Source Stone.

Therefore, the amount of Extreme Dao Source Stone revealed is too small to be known to the outside world.

The effect of the Extreme Dao Source Stone is similar to that of the Extreme Dao Source Crystal, but the effect is not much, after all, the Extreme Dao Source Stone contains too little Extreme Dao power.

But.

There are a lot of Extreme Dao Source Stones here, a whole ore vein, with so many Extreme Dao Source Stones, he may be able to master the Golden Extreme Dao with the help of these Extreme Dao Source Stones.

If you have a surplus Extreme Dao Source Stone, you can also trade it.

"Take these Extreme Dao Source Stones!"

Ye Tian couldn't wait.

Thereupon.

He went deep into the island and began to dig for the Extreme Dao Source Stone.

But soon, he discovered that there were traces of the life of extreme creatures here, but unfortunately there was no way to peek into the past time and space, so he could not know the specific situation here.

"Maybe this was once the territory of a certain Extreme Creature, but that Extreme Creature may have fallen, or it may have gone out and never returned. No matter what, let's take these Extreme Dao Source Stones first. "

Ye Tian was extremely fast, and he quickly took away all the Extreme Dao Source Stones in this Extreme Dao Source Stone vein.

Then, Ye Tian immediately fled.

After a while, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Next, he was going to send these Extreme Dao Source Stones out and bring them out of the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

This process is a bit dangerous, in case on the road, the dragon crow copy body is killed by the super perfect master, then these extreme path source stones will be gone.

If the will clone takes away the Extreme Dao Source Stone and is targeted by the Extreme Dao creature, it will be finished.

In order to ensure safety, Ye Tian sent the two will clones into the Extreme Dao Source Sea to explore the route, while the replica body was waiting in the entrance area of the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

"Hope everything goes well!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With two will clones exploring the road, even if it encounters danger and falls, it can also allow Longwu to copy his body to warn in advance, so as to avoid danger.

In the end, one of Ye Tian's copy bodies encountered a dangerous fall, but he also successfully avoided a danger, allowing Long Wu's copy body to send these Extreme Dao Source Stones to another will clone.

Then, the dragon crow copy body began to take on the task of probing, mainly to guard against those extreme creatures.

After a while.

"The dragon crow copy body has been killed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Because he bumped into a super-perfect controller and was killed by the other party in seconds.

......

"Hey, after this Extreme Dao creature was killed, there was no Extreme Dao Source Crystal, and the flesh quickly dissipated!"

The super-perfect controller who killed Ye Tianlongwu's copied body was puzzled.

In the end, he only regarded the Longwu copy body as some kind of special extreme creature clone, so it was only a condensed clone that would become like this.

Although the Longwu copy body fell, in the end, Ye Tian's luck was still good, and the remaining will clone successfully brought back the Extreme Dao Source Stone and sent it to Ye Tian's copy body.

And then.

Ye Tian quickly returned to Jidao Mountain.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Space-Time Ancestral Realm and sent the Extreme Dao Source Stone to the Wudao Tower and stored it in his own tower, only then did he breathe a sigh of relief.

In this way, these Extreme Dao Source Stones really belong to him, and no one can take them away.

"These Extreme Dao Source Stones are a huge resource for me, I don't need them to practice for the time being, anyway, I can continue to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao in the Extreme Dao Mountain. And the true value of the Extreme Dao Source Stone is to trade with other perfect controllers to get the materials I need. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was going to take some Extreme Dao Source Stones in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm and trade them with some Perfect Controllers for Extreme Creation Materials, maybe in the future, the Extreme Creation Materials needed to break the thirty-six Extreme Creation Chains would be enough!

......

The Ancestral City of Time and Space.

Ye Tian came here, and immediately issued a reward, to trade the Extreme Dao Source Stone for the Extreme Creation Substance.

Not long after, a super-perfect controller met Ye Tian in a palace in the Space-Time Ancestral City, which was a temporary residence for Ye Tian in the space-time ancestral city.

"Infinite Controller Ye Tian!"

"Lord of Ten Thousand Bones!"

Ye Tian and the other party briefly introduced each other.

The Lord of Ten Thousand Bones has not entered the Extreme Dao List, so the number of Extreme Dao mastered will definitely not exceed two, and his strength is not too top among the super-perfect masters.

"Ye Tian, I know that you, the demon who has entered the Extreme Dao List, I didn't expect you to create the Extreme Realm Half-Step Perfect Controller Realm, and actually get such an incomparably rare treasure as the Extreme Dao Source Stone!"

"Lord of Ten Thousand Bones, I need a lot of Extreme Creation Materials, how many do you have?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, I really have a lot of pole-making substances in my hands. The Lord of Ten Thousand Bones smiled and said, "I have mastered several treasure lands that continue to breed extreme creation substances, and I don't have any apprentices, so these extreme creation substances have naturally always existed. "

"I have a thousand Extreme Dao Source Stones in my hands!" Ye Tian said.

"A thousand!" The Lord of Ten Thousand Bones' expression moved, and he was immediately shocked, "No problem, I want them all!"

Immediately, the Lord of Ten Thousand Bones took out a large amount of Pole Creation Materials, and exchanged them according to the normal value ratio of the Pole Creation Materials to the Extreme Dao Source Stones.

In the end, the Lord of Ten Thousand Bones almost exhausted all the Extreme Creation Materials on his body, and only then did he exchange for a thousand Extreme Dao Source Stones.

"I've made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
